display.purpose: Big numerals — dashboard stat values, headline metrics.

body.purpose: Default UI text; tables and dense panels. Prose caps at 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Field labels, badges, metadata; sidebar group labels add uppercase + tracking.

shadows.name: elevation-border
shadows.purpose: Faintest tier — small interactive controls (Input, Checkbox, Switch, Tag, secondary Button).

shadows.name: elevation-raised
shadows.purpose: Resting container surfaces — Card, Panel, Accordion.

shadows.name: elevation-overlay
shadows.purpose: Floating elements — Dialog, Drawer, Menu, Popover, Toast.

motion.name: fade-in
motion.purpose: Default fade-in; fade-out is 0.2s. All animations ship a motion-reduce:animate-none fallback.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The page's main action — ink-charcoal fill, used once per view.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 1rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: oklch(0.22 0.008 54); color: oklch(0.985 0.002 54); font: 600 0.875rem InterVariable, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms, transform 150ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.15 0.008 54); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.62 0.007 54); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: The real default variant — white surface, hairline border, faint control shadow.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 1rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.86 0.005 54); border-radius: 0.375rem; background: #ffffff; color: oklch(0.22 0.008 54); font: 600 0.875rem InterVariable, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0px 0.3px 0.3px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.14), 0px 1px 1.2px -3px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.12); transition: background 150ms, border-color 150ms, transform 150ms; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(0.92 0.004 54); border-color: oklch(0.76 0.005 54); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.62 0.007 54); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: White-surface field with hairline border and a calm focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 0.75rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.86 0.005 54); border-radius: 0.375rem; background: #ffffff; color: oklch(0.22 0.008 54); font: 400 0.875rem InterVariable, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0px 0.3px 0.3px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.14), 0px 1px 1.2px -3px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.12); outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.62 0.007 54); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.62 0.007 54); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.62 0.007 54 / 0.35); }

components.name: Card
components.description: A white slip resting on ledger paper — raised shadow, generous inset, no border.
components.html:
Tickets sold

8,540

+5.2% vs last month
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 1.5rem; box-shadow: 0px 0.3px 0.8px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.28), 0px 1.4px 1.3px -2px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.21), 0px 6.7px 6px -4px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.15); font-family: InterVariable, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-label { margin: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.62 0.007 54); } .ds-card-value { margin: 0.375rem 0 0; font-size: 2.25rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.1; color: oklch(0.22 0.008 54); } .ds-card-hint { margin: 0.375rem 0 0; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.62 0.007 54); }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Pill metadata tag; semantic variants tint background + dark foreground.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.985 0.002 54); border: 1px solid oklch(0.86 0.005 54); color: oklch(0.22 0.008 54); font: 500 0.75rem InterVariable, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Quiet nav link; active state is a hairline fill + medium weight, never a colored bar.
components.html: AnalyticsBillingTeams
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.125rem; padding: 0.25rem; background: oklch(0.965 0.003 54); font-family: InterVariable, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 0.5rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.22 0.008 54 / 0.8); text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms, background 150ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(0.92 0.004 54); } .ds-nav-item--active { background: oklch(0.86 0.005 54); color: oklch(0.22 0.008 54); font-weight: 500; }

narrative.overview: These pages are a beautifully-kept book of record. Every surface is legible, every number sits exactly where it should, and the whole thing reads as something you would trust to run a business on. The visual system is almost entirely monochrome — a single warm-charcoal neutral (hue 54) carries page, text, borders, and controls — so that the rare appearance of color means something. Nothing is decorative. The system is built so an adopter sees a dashboard or settings form and thinks 'I want my product to look like this, and I can build it with just these components.' That trust is the product, earned through restraint and consistency, not novelty: the same button shape, field vocabulary, and shadow physics on every page. Density appears only where the data earns it.
keyCharacteristics: Near-monochrome warm-charcoal surface; color is reserved for meaning, never decoration.
Inter Variable throughout — one family carries headings, data, labels, and body.
A real, restrained three-tier shadow vocabulary (border / raised / overlay) — not flat.
Semantic relational spacing (tight → section) that makes rhythm a token, not a guess.
Motion is state-only: ease-out curves, 150–300 ms, with reduced-motion fallbacks built in.

rules.name: The Meaning-Only Color Rule
rules.body: Charcoal carries the surface. Every non-neutral color must encode meaning — primary action, current selection, or a semantic state. Color used for decoration is forbidden. If you cannot name the meaning, use charcoal.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: Inter does everything. Introducing a second typeface — especially a display/serif face in UI labels, buttons, or data — is forbidden. Hierarchy comes from weight (400 → 800) and a fixed rem scale, never from fluid clamp() sizing.

rules.name: The Altitude Rule
rules.body: Shadow tier maps to physical altitude, never to importance. A control is border, a resting container is raised, a floating element is overlay. Never reach for a heavier shadow to make something feel more important — use color or weight for emphasis, shadow only for height.

dos: Do build every example from @marigold/components on the RUI theme. If a result needs raw CSS, that is a system gap to file, not a hack to ship.
Do carry the surface with charcoal and reserve color for meaning — primary action, selection, semantic state.
Do use the semantic spacing scale (tight 6px → related 8px → regular 24px → group 48px → section 96px) to build rhythm; vary spacing for hierarchy.
Do map shadow tier to physical altitude: border for controls, raised for containers, overlay for floating elements.
Do keep one button shape, one field vocabulary, one icon style across every page. The tool should disappear into the task.
Do keep secondary/muted text at Quiet Ink (charcoal-600) or darker — it clears 4.5:1 on both Ledger Paper and Slip White. Verify contrast; never go lighter for elegance.
Do prove one realistic scenario well per page. Depth over inventory.
donts: Don't ship generic AI/SaaS slop: identical icon-heading-text card grids, the big-number hero-metric template, gradient text, tiny tracked-uppercase eyebrows above every section, or decorative glassmorphism.
Don't leave it reading like untouched Bootstrap/MUI defaults — compose deliberately.
Don't over-design: no heavy gradients, no animation-everywhere, no decorative color. Motion conveys state, not personality.
Don't create cluttered enterprise overload — cramped, every-pixel-filled density with no breathing room.
Don't use Marigold Orange (or any saturated hue) as a default fill or a decorative flourish; it is a flag, not paint.
Don't introduce a second typeface, fluid clamp() heading sizes, or display fonts in UI labels/buttons/data.
Don't use border-left/border-right > 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards, list items, or alerts.
Don't add a colored glow on focus or a heavier shadow to signal importance — emphasis is weight and color, height is shadow.
